page_title: Shinji and Good Friends: AMERICAN PAGE1
text:
is a video game that was developed and published by Gainax on 24 September 1999 for Microsoft Windows 95/98. It was sold for 7800 Yen (plus tax) when released.

Overview

Three game modes are available. The first two, "tournament" and "free match" allow you to face three other players. The third mode called "score attack" offers the player. The goal is to get the highest score. At the time of the game's release, it was possible to send your score to Gainax to display it in a world ranking available on the studio's official website. This opus offers an atmosphere evoking the conquest of the West. http://web.archive.org/web/20050407101112/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/page1/index-e.html

Trivia

The cover was illustrated by Tadashi Hiramatsu.
